title: pternandra simplex
intro: Pternandra simplex, also known as the "Red Backed Pterandra", is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pternandra simplex include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Pternandra simplex is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be made by infusing the leaves and stems of the plant in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
